title: Jajpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Jajpur with a Z-Score of +5.37. This is a critical event with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Jajpur has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 17.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 51%, and wind speed is 4.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has a significant impact on daily life, and necessary precautions are advised.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
